paper.title: High-resolution spectroscopic study of massive blue and red supergiants in Perseus OB1. I. Definition of the sample, membership, and kinematics

review.summary: 该论文对Per OB1星协(含h和χ Persei双星团)周围4.5度内的88颗大质量蓝/红超巨星候选体进行了高分辨率光谱观测(共405条光谱)，结合Gaia DR2天体测量数据，研究样本星的成员资格、双星性质和逃逸星(runaway)状态。主要发现：(1)79颗星被确认为可能成员；(2)O型星中约45%为逃逸星，而更演化恒星中逃逸比例<~5%；(3)O型星中光谱双星比例约15%，B超巨星中约10%，更冷超巨星中几乎为零。论文识别的是星协成员中的'runaway stars'(逃离星)——即从诞生星团中被动力学或超新星爆发弹射的恒星，但这些恒星仍在银河系束缚轨道上。论文未涉及银河系非束缚超高速星(HVS)的定义或搜寻，未将任何恒星识别为HVS候选体。论文含4个主文表格(Table 1-4，关于视差分布、RV变化性、逃逸星统计、双星统计)和5个附录长表格(Table A1-A5，完整星表、多历元RV、SB1星、成员资格汇总、所有RV测量)。

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table 1: 不同半径范围内恒星的视差和自行平均值及标准偏差。用于评估Per OB1星协的空间范围和成员星天体测量参数的一致性。

source_refs.caption: Mean and standard deviation of parallaxes and proper motions for different groups of stars located at increased distance from the center of h and χ Persei.
source_refs.label: table.radiplxpm

columns.name: Radius
columns.meaning: Angular distance from cluster center in degrees

columns.name: N_stars
columns.meaning: Number of stars in radial bin

columns.name: mu
columns.meaning: Mean proper motion with standard deviation

internal_tables.evidence: Table 1 in main text (Sec 2.3 Gaia observations). tabular environment within table float. 5 data rows.
internal_tables.comments: 5 radial bins from cluster center to 4.5 deg.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table 2: 多历元RV变化性统计——15颗有足够多历元恒星的分光谱型RV峰峰值振幅平均值和最大值。用于评估不同光谱型的本征RV变化性水平。

source_refs.caption: Summary of detected variability (mean and maximum of peak-to-peak amplitude of RV in each SpT group) for the sample of 15 stars.
source_refs.label: table.variab

columns.name: SpT group
columns.meaning: Spectral type group (O, B, A/F, K/M)

columns.name: mean_N_spectra
columns.meaning: Mean number of spectra per star

internal_tables.evidence: Table 2 in main text (Sec 4.4). tabular within table float. 4 data rows.
internal_tables.comments: Table 2 referenced in Section 4.4 when discussing RV variability.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table 3: 逃逸星统计——按光谱型统计自行和RV超出2σ/4σ的离群星数目，以及最终确认为逃逸星的数量和百分比。核心科学产出表。

source_refs.caption: Summary of the number of outliers in proper motion and RV that are used for the final identification of runaway stars.
source_refs.label: table.rw

columns.name: mu_alpha_outliers
columns.meaning: Number of μ_α cos δ outliers >2σ

columns.name: mu_total_outliers
columns.meaning: Number of total proper motion outliers >2σ

columns.name: runaway_count
columns.meaning: Number of clearly identified runaway stars

columns.name: runaway_pct
columns.meaning: Percentage of runaway stars relative to total in SpT group

internal_tables.evidence: Table 3 in main text (Sec 4.5). table* float spanning two columns. 4 data rows for O, B, A/F, K/M types.
internal_tables.comments: Key science table. Shows 45% of O stars are runaways vs ~5% for evolved stars.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table 4: 双星统计——按光谱型统计SB1、SB2、文献双星、候选SB1数目，以及双星百分比。

source_refs.caption: Summary of the number of binary stars in the sample.
source_refs.label: table.bin

columns.name: SB1
columns.meaning: Number of confirmed single-lined spectroscopic binaries (with percentage)

columns.name: SB2
columns.meaning: Number of confirmed double-lined spectroscopic binaries (with percentage)

columns.name: Lit
columns.meaning: Number of binary stars found in literature

columns.name: SB1_candidate
columns.meaning: Number of candidate SB1 stars (including LPV/SB1 ambiguous cases)

columns.name: N_All
columns.meaning: Total number of stars in SpT group

columns.name: pct_bin
columns.meaning: Percentage of confirmed + candidate binary stars

internal_tables.evidence: Table 4 in main text (Sec 4.5). table* float. 4 data rows plus B I&II subgroup.
internal_tables.comments: B stars split into giants and supergiants subgroups.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table A1: 完整星表——88颗样本星的名称、光谱型、坐标、G星等、BP-RP颜色、Gaia DR2自行、视差、最佳S/N RV和注释。论文的核心数据表。

source_refs.caption: Sample of (super-)giant stars within 4.5 degrees around the Perseus double cluster.
source_refs.label: table.A1

columns.name: mu_alpha_cos_delta
columns.meaning: Proper motion in RA (cos δ corrected)

internal_tables.evidence: Appendix Table A1. longtable environment. ~88 data rows spanning 6 pages. Referenced throughout the paper as the primary sample catalog.
internal_tables.comments: Multi-page longtable. Includes footnote markers for special cases (SB2, alternative astrometry sources, etc.).

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table A2: 多历元RV测量结果——≥5条光谱的非SB1/SB2星的逐历元RV。用于评估RV变化性。

source_refs.caption: Results from the multi-epoch RV measurements for stars with five or more spectra, excluding confirmed SB1 and SB2 stars.
source_refs.label: table.A2

internal_tables.evidence: Appendix Table A2. longtable. Multi-epoch RV for 15 stars.
internal_tables.comments: Showcases RV stability/variability of non-binary stars.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table A3: 确认SB1星的多历元RV测量结果。

source_refs.caption: Results from the multi-epoch RV measurements for all confirmed SB1 stars.
source_refs.label: table.A3

internal_tables.evidence: Appendix Table A3. longtable. Multi-epoch RV for SB1 stars.
internal_tables.comments: Demonstrates RV variability of confirmed spectroscopic binaries.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table A4: 成员资格和特征汇总——每颗星在视差、自行、最佳RV和多历元RV等方面的离群状态，以及最终成员资格判定(是/候选/否)。

source_refs.caption: Membership and features of investigated stars.
source_refs.label: table.A4

columns.name: varpi_status
columns.meaning: Parallax outlier status (filled circle=within 2σ, empty circle=2-3σ outlier, cross=>3σ outlier)

columns.name: spec_variability
columns.meaning: Spectral variability classification (SB1, SB2, LPV, etc.)

columns.name: comments
columns.meaning: Additional comments on astrometric quality or special cases

internal_tables.evidence: Appendix Table A4. longtable. Full sample membership summary. ~88 rows.
internal_tables.comments: Key summary table synthesizing all membership indicators. Uses visual symbols (●, ○, ×) for outlier status.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Table A5 (rvstable): 所有恒星的完整逐历元RV测量——论文最详尽的数据表，包含所有405条光谱的RV测量。

source_refs.caption: All RV measurements for individual epochs in all the stars in the sample.
source_refs.label: table.rvstable

internal_tables.evidence: Appendix Table A5 (label: table.rvstable). longtable spanning ~450 lines. Contains all 405 spectra RV measurements.
internal_tables.comments: Most comprehensive data table. Multi-page longtable.
